A remote attacker with high privileges, such as a realm administrator configuring a malicious Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server or an attacker compromising an upstream LDAP server, could exploit this vulnerability. By sending a malformed LDAP password policy response during a password authentication request, the attacker can trigger an OutOfMemoryError. This causes the Keycloak Java Virtual Machine (JVM) to terminate, leading to a denial of service (DoS) for all realms on the affected node.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00476, "percentile": 0.37574}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f6r7-6w34-x2gp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T21:26:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f6r7-6w34-x2gp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f6r7-6w34-x2gp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9801"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T06:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T06:31:10Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9801", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-9801", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2482473", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:25098", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:25097", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30049", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30050", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/issues/49434", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/49514", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/commit/2c4fe42235ba8c265b1da3a30541a270d5bd8c39", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f6r7-6w34-x2gp"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak", "summary": "Keycloak Vulnerable to Improper Validation of Specified Quantity in Input", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T21:26:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f6r7-6w34-x2gp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "26.6.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.keycloak:keycloak-ldap-federation"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.6.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
